product: Monitor and revoke personal access tokens in your account (GA)
tagline: The token report page enables account admins to monitor and revoke personal access tokens (PATs) in the account console.
what_it_does: The token report page enables account admins to monitor and revoke personal access tokens (PATs) in the account console. Databricks recommends you use OAuth access tokens instead of PATs for greater security and convenience. To authenticate to the Databricks REST API, a user can create a personal access token (PAT) and use it in their REST API request.
why_it_matters: Databricks recommends you minimize your personal access token exposure with the following steps: 1.
plain_summary: The token report page enables account admins to monitor and revoke personal access tokens (PATs) in the account console. Databricks recommends you use OAuth access tokens instead of PATs for greater security and convenience.
key_takeaway: The token report page enables account admins to monitor and revoke personal access tokens (PATs) in the account console.
